name: SCI.Occurrences.Arrays

--------------------------------------------------------------------
  sci-occurrences-arrays -- identify occurrences of array based items

record_types.name: Occurrence

subprograms.name: Add
List
Longest
Same
subprograms.code:
function Same (Left, Right : Occurrence)
               return Boolean

subprograms.name: Sum

generic_instantiations.name: Sets
generic_instantiations.code:
package Sets is
  new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Ordered_Sets (Occurrence, "<", Same);

generic_instantiations.name: Vectors
generic_instantiations.code:
package Vectors is
  new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Vectors (Positive, Occurrence);

formals.name: Array_Type
formals.code: type Array_Type is array (Index_Type range <>) of Element_Type;
